Description.SourceString: The blood of a dragon is a strange thing. It is infused with magic in a way that most other creatures can’t match, a side effect of the alchemical processes that created their kind. Dragonkin scientists needed blood that could adapt to a wide range of chimeric additions to the body. As such dragon blood, unlike human blood, doesn’t possess any particular type and each could act as donor to the other.
